subject: 4-hour ER wait with chest pain
description: Waited four and a half hours in the emergency room with chest pain before being seen by a doctor.

subject: 5-hour wait for stroke symptoms
description: Brought my mother in for stroke symptoms. Waited five hours twenty minutes before a neurologist assessed her.

subject: 3-hour wait in pediatrics
description: My 6-year-old waited three hours in pediatric clinic for a simple ear infection check. Overcrowded and understaffed.

subject: Cardiology 2.5 hour delay
description: Waited two hours forty minutes past my scheduled cardiology appointment. Cardiologist was running behind with no explanation.

subject: ER wait all night
description: Arrived with severe abdominal pain at 8pm. Not triaged until 11pm. Did not see doctor until nearly 1am.

subject: Orthopedics wait worsened my condition
description: Orthopedics appointment had me in a hard plastic chair for two and a half hours. Sitting aggravates my knee injury.

subject: Urgent CT scan 4.5 hour wait
description: Urgent referral from primary care physician. Arrived at radiology at 9am. Not taken in until 1:30pm.

subject: Oncology infusion 90 minute delay
description: Cancer patients are exhausted. Waiting ninety minutes past scheduled infusion makes the experience even harder.

subject: Toddler fever 3 hour ER wait
description: Toddler had 104 temperature. Waited three hours in ER before being seen. High fever in young child should be higher priority.

subject: Outpatient clinic 3 hours late
description: Follow-up appointment clinic running three hours behind. No one informed me when I arrived. Took half a day off work.

subject: Cardiology wait caused missed work
description: 9am cardiology appointment not seen until 12:30pm. Had to leave without completing appointment to get back to work.

subject: Pediatric urgent care waiting room too small
description: Pediatric urgent care waiting room cannot accommodate volume. Families with sick children standing in hallways.

subject: ER wait in active labor
description: Arrived in active labor and waited twenty-five minutes before obstetrics was notified. Not flagged as obstetric emergency.

subject: MRI delayed 2 hours no updates
description: MRI appointment delayed two hours with no explanation. Sat in waiting area not knowing if appointment was still happening.

subject: ER wait times getting worse each visit
description: Three ER visits in two years. Each visit longer than the last. This most recent visit I waited six hours.

subject: Post-op follow-up 2 hour wait
description: Post-operative follow-up in orthopedics had me waiting two hours. Recently had knee replacement and walking is painful.

subject: 3.5 hour wait for pediatric specialist
description: Pediatric neurology consultation scheduled six weeks in advance. Waited three and a half hours on the day.

subject: Cardiac stress test 3 hour delay
description: Scheduled at 8am. Setup did not begin until 11am. Was fasting per instructions. Fasted over fifteen hours total.

subject: ER overcrowded 5 hour wait
description: Emergency room standing room only. Waited five hours for suspected broken arm. Triage nurse never came back.

subject: Oncology consistently 90 minutes late
description: Every single oncology follow-up in six months started at least ninety minutes late. Undergoing chemotherapy. Fatigue makes delays especially hard.

subject: 7 hour ER wait for kidney stone
description: Severe lower back pain. Waited seven hours. Eventually admitted for kidney stone. Seven hours unacceptable for severe pain.

subject: Outpatient nearly 2 hours late
description: Waited one hour fifty minutes past scheduled appointment time in general medicine outpatient clinic. No explanation.

subject: Pediatric ER 2 hour wait for concussion
description: Pediatric ER noticeably better staffed but still waited two hours with possible concussion. Should be evaluated faster.

subject: Pre-op assessment 4 hour delay
description: Pre-operative assessment before shoulder surgery took almost four hours due to lab and cardiology clearance delays.

subject: Radiology chronically delayed
description: Four radiology appointments in one year. Every single one started more than an hour late. Systematically underestimating scan times.

subject: ER 4 hour wait for allergic reaction
description: Came with facial allergic reaction causing swelling. Waited four hours despite flagging facial swelling to triage nurse.

subject: Cardiology walk-in 3 hours not 45 minutes
description: Posted wait time was 45 minutes. I waited three hours fifteen minutes. Posted wait times are not accurate.

subject: Oncology infusion understaffed Mondays
description: Oncology infusion suite clearly understaffed on Mondays and Fridays. Wait significantly longer those days every time.

subject: 4 hour ER wait for stroke symptoms
description: Father showed three stroke symptoms. Waited four hours before neurologist available. Time critical in stroke treatment.

subject: Pediatrics one hour late for well-child check
description: Well-child check appointment one hour late. No explanation. Unacceptable for a routine scheduled appointment.

subject: ER no charging stations during 5 hour wait
description: Waited five hours for kidney stone. No charging stations limited seating broken television. Amenities inadequate for long waits.

subject: Four month wait for rheumatology
description: Referred for active symptoms. Earliest rheumatology appointment is in four months. Completely unacceptable for an active condition.

subject: ER triage 45 minutes for chest pressure
description: Arrived with severe chest pressure. Initial triage took forty-five minutes. Cardiac symptom should trigger immediate triage.

subject: 2.5 hour wait with contrast solution inside
description: Had to drink contrast solution before CT scan. Arrived 30 minutes early as instructed then waited additional 2.5 hours.

subject: Mental health appointment 90 minutes late
description: Behavioral health appointment ninety minutes late. Patients seeking mental health treatment are already anxious.

subject: 82-year-old with heart failure waited 2.5 hours
description: 82-year-old mother with heart failure waited two and a half hours. No recliners or beds in the waiting area for elderly patients.

subject: Pediatric asthma attack 1 hour room wait
description: Son had asthma attack. Seen quickly by triage but waited over an hour in a room before physician appeared.

subject: Six week wait then 2 more hours on the day
description: Told about six-week booking wait. Can accept that. But then waited two more hours past appointment time on the day.

subject: 6 hours for broken finger
description: Six hours in ER for a broken finger that needed only a splint and X-ray. ER overwhelmed on weekend evenings.

subject: Oncology consultation 2 hours late
description: Pre-chemotherapy consultation delayed two hours. Arrived psychologically prepared then waited two hours. Please consider emotional toll.

subject: Booking portal crashes at checkout
description: Online booking portal crashes when confirming appointment at payment screen. Tried three times across two days on different browsers.

subject: Double booked through online portal
description: Booked cardiology appointment online and received two confirmation emails for the same slot. Another patient had same appointment.

subject: No confirmation email after booking
description: Booked outpatient appointment through online portal four days ago. No confirmation email. Unsure if booking went through.

subject: Portal login fails every time
description: Cannot log into CarePoint patient portal. Enter credentials page refreshes back to login screen. Reset password twice.

subject: Appointment time changed without notice
description: Booked for 2pm on Tuesday through portal. No notification. Checked portal day before and it showed 9am. Changed with no notice.

subject: Available slots throw errors when booked
description: Portal shows available slots but when I try to book them I get slot unavailable error. Tried eight slots across three departments.

subject: Portal crashes on mobile
description: Appointment booking portal does not work on mobile. Loads but crashes when selecting specialty. Should not require desktop to book.

subject: Booked adult cardiology instead of pediatric
description: Portal booked me into adult cardiology when I was trying to book pediatric cardiology for my 10-year-old. Not clearly differentiated.

subject: No follow-up booking option in portal
description: Discharge paperwork says book follow-up through portal within two weeks. Portal only has new patient appointments. Cannot book follow-up.

subject: Portal times out mid-booking
description: Portal times out during booking if I take more than two minutes to fill in the form. Insurance information gone and I have to start over.

subject: Payment processing fails in booking
description: Portal accepts appointment details but fails at payment screen when I enter insurance information. Error just says payment failed.

subject: Double booked radiology appointment
description: Booked radiology appointment and confirmed it. Arrived and there was no appointment. Portal had also booked a duplicate for the next week.

subject: Portal insurance dropdown outdated
description: My insurance is not listed in portal dropdown. Hospital accepts my insurance confirmed by phone. Portal insurance list is out of date.

subject: Confirmation code invalid at desk
description: Booking confirmation code from email does not match any appointment in hospital system when I provide it at registration. Happened twice.

subject: Portal loses 15 minutes of entered data
description: Spent fifteen minutes entering medical history into new patient registration. Portal timed out and lost everything. Please add auto-save.

subject: Cannot cancel appointment through portal
description: Portal shows appointment but there is no cancel button. Help page says cancel through portal but there is no cancel function.

subject: Portal booking not syncing with hospital system
description: Booked online and received confirmation. Hospital had no record when I called to confirm. Portal and scheduling system not in sync.

subject: Pediatric booking fails at guardian consent
description: Every time I try to book a pediatric appointment portal shows error at guardian consent step. Have to call in for pediatric bookings.

subject: Referral booking flow missing from portal
description: I have a GP referral to see a specialist at CarePoint. Portal does not have a referral booking flow. Only self-referrals supported.

subject: 14 reminder texts for one appointment
description: Appointment reminder system sent fourteen texts about a single appointment over 24 hours. Worried I was being double-booked repeatedly.

subject: Logged out between each booking
description: Need to book follow-ups for three departments. Portal logs me out after each booking. Have to log back in for the next one.

subject: Upcoming appointments box gives permission error
description: Portal home page shows upcoming appointments box. Click it and get a permission error. Can see I have an appointment but not the details.

subject: Emergency booking option just says call us
description: Portal has emergency booking option but clicking it shows message to call main number. If it just redirects to phone the option should not exist.

subject: Overseas visitor cannot book without local address
description: Family member visiting from abroad needs urgent appointment. Cannot create portal account without local address. No guest booking option.

subject: Portal unresponsive on weekends
description: Tried to book appointments on three separate weekends. Portal loads but no buttons work. Can only use it on weekdays during business hours.

subject: Wrong location booked through portal
description: Specified CarePoint North in booking. Portal confirmed appointment at CarePoint Central which is forty minutes further away.

subject: Portal treats me as new patient every time
description: Returning patient but portal treats me as new patient every booking. Previous appointment history gone. Must re-enter medical history.

subject: Double-booked through portal twice in six months
description: Double-booked via portal for cardiology and radiology in six months. Registration desk always only honors one.

subject: Portal locked after password reset
description: Reset password through portal and link works. Can set new password. Portal still will not accept new credentials. Locked out.

subject: Oncology not listed in portal specialty selection
description: Oncology department not listed in portal specialty selection. Oncology patients cannot use online booking at all. Must call in.

subject: Billed for service I did not receive
description: Charged for specialist consultation I never saw. Waited three hours and left. Should not be billed for appointment that did not happen.

subject: Insurance not applied to ER bill
description: My insurance should cover eighty percent of ER visit. Bill shows full amount with no insurance deduction despite approved claim.

subject: Duplicate charge for echocardiogram
description: Bill includes two identical line items for a single echocardiogram. Billed twice for one procedure performed once.

subject: Wrong billing code applied
description: Billing code on explanation of benefits does not match service received. Seen for routine follow-up billed as complex new patient consultation.

subject: Balance billing after insurance paid
description: Paid co-pay at visit. Insurance paid their portion. Now receiving bill for amounts insurance already covered. Balance billing prohibited by my plan.

subject: Billed for cancellation within free window
description: Cancelled 48 hours in advance and received cancellation fee bill. Patient agreement states cancellations over 24 hours are fee-free.

subject: Radiology bill six months after visit
description: Received radiology bill six months after visit. Had assumed insurance settled. Large surprise bill six months later is financially disruptive.

subject: Two bills for one hospital stay
description: Two separate bills for single three-day admission one from hospital and one from physician group. Was not informed they bill separately.

subject: Expired insurance code on bill
description: Bill shows insurance code from previous year plan which expired in January. Current insurance information was on file. Wrong year used.

subject: Billed for imaging that was cancelled
description: Doctor ordered MRI that was later cancelled because symptoms resolved. Was never sent for scan but received bill six weeks later.

subject: Overcharged on co-pay
description: At check-in told co-pay was 50 dollars and I paid it. Insurance plan shows specialist co-pay is 30 dollars. Overcharged 20 dollars.

subject: Lab bill shows wrong patient name
description: Bill from CarePoint laboratory shows different patient name despite my ID being verified at check-in. Concerned about mixed records.

subject: Billed for interpreter that did not show
description: Requested interpreter at booking and was confirmed one. Interpreter did not show. Proceeded without one. Then received bill for interpreter services.

subject: Interest charges on disputed balance
description: Billing dispute in process but receiving late payment notices and interest charges on disputed amount. Wrong to charge interest on active dispute.

subject: Co-pay collected twice for one visit
description: Front desk collected co-pay at check-in. Billing then sent an additional co-pay invoice for the same visit. Paid twice for one appointment.

subject: Secondary insurance never billed
description: I have two insurance plans. CarePoint only bills primary and sends me the remainder without attempting secondary. This is not how coordination works.

subject: Financial assistance application ignored
description: Submitted charity care application with supporting documents three months ago. No response. Meanwhile receiving collection threats.

subject: Procedure billed under wrong physician
description: My procedure was performed by Dr. Okafor but the claim was submitted under a Dr. Smith I have never seen. Insurance is disputing coverage.

subject: Surprise anesthesia bill three months later
description: Had outpatient surgery in October. Received separate anesthesia bill in January for 2400 dollars. Was not told anesthesiology bills separately.

subject: Copay amount changed with no notice
description: My specialist co-pay was 30 dollars for two years. Now charged 60 dollars. No notification of change. Insurance confirms my co-pay is still 30 dollars.

subject: Bill sent to old address after update
description: Updated my address six months ago in the portal. Billing department still sending to old address. Now receiving late notices.

subject: Charge for phone consultation I declined
description: Was offered a phone consultation and declined it in favor of an in-person visit. Received a bill for the phone consultation I never had.

subject: Self-pay discount not applied despite request
description: Specifically asked for self-pay discount at registration. Was told it would be applied. Bill reflects full charges. The discount was never applied.

subject: Medical records fee higher than posted
description: Posted fee for records release is 25 dollars. Was charged 85 dollars. No explanation for the difference. No itemization provided.

subject: Veteran benefits not applied
description: I have VA coverage and submitted documentation at registration. Bill shows no VA coverage applied. Am being billed as uninsured.

subject: Lab results missing from MyChart for 2 weeks
description: Blood panel drawn two weeks ago. Results still do not appear in MyChart. Need to share with another provider urgently.

subject: Wrong patient records visible in portal
description: When I log into MyChart I can see records that are not mine including someone else's medication list. This is a HIPAA violation.

subject: MyChart app will not load
description: The MyChart mobile app shows a loading spinner indefinitely. Has been happening for five days. Cannot access any health records.

subject: After visit summary not in portal
description: My appointment was two weeks ago and after-visit summary still does not appear in MyChart. Need it for insurance reimbursement.

subject: Immunization history incomplete
description: MyChart shows only two childhood vaccinations. Full vaccination history was transferred from previous provider. Other records are missing.

subject: Resolved diagnoses still on active problem list
description: MyChart shows diagnoses that were resolved and removed by my physician. The active problem list is inaccurate and could affect future care.

subject: Current medications missing from portal list
description: Three of my current prescriptions do not appear in my MyChart medication list. An ER provider relying on this in an emergency could cause serious harm.

subject: Cannot message my doctor through portal
description: The send message to provider feature has been broken for three weeks. I click send and get an error. Have post-discharge questions with no way to ask.

subject: Old provider still listed as primary care
description: Changed my primary care physician eight months ago. MyChart still lists my old PCP. Referrals are going to the wrong provider.

subject: Records release request not processed
description: Submitted records release authorization six weeks ago. Records have not been sent to my new specialist. The release request appears to be lost.

subject: Pathology report not uploading to chart
description: Surgical pathology reports are not appearing in MyChart. My surgeon said they were finalized three weeks ago. Cannot view my own pathology results.

subject: MyChart password reset email never arrives
description: Password reset email never arrives. Checked spam. Cannot access MyChart at all and my healthcare is being disrupted as a result.

subject: Wrong allergens listed in my chart
description: MyChart lists penicillin as a confirmed allergen. I am not allergic to penicillin. A provider relying on this incorrect flag could withhold needed treatment.

subject: Family proxy access not working
description: Set up proxy access to view my elderly mother's records. Proxy access was approved but I cannot see her records. The proxy feature is broken.

subject: Visit notes from before 2024 are missing
description: Can see recent visits but notes from any visit before 2024 are simply missing. Historical records are important for continuity of care.

subject: Referral status never updates in portal
description: MyChart shows my specialist referral as pending. My PCP says it was approved and sent three weeks ago. Status has not updated.

subject: Apple Health sync broken
description: My Apple Health data stopped syncing to MyChart four weeks ago. Steps sleep and heart rate data all missing. Integration appears broken.

subject: Duplicate entries in problem list
description: My problem list in MyChart has duplicate entries for several diagnoses. Each condition appears two to three times. Confusing my specialist.

subject: Preferred language setting not applied
description: Selected Spanish as my preferred language in MyChart. Some sections show Spanish but critical sections like medications and diagnoses are still in English.

subject: Recent imaging not visible in chart
description: Had a chest X-ray last week. Imaging section of MyChart shows nothing. I know the images exist because my doctor discussed them with me.

subject: Insurance card upload always fails
description: Portal will not accept photos of my insurance card. Tried JPG PNG and PDF formats. All fail with a generic error. Cannot update insurance information.

subject: Notification preferences not saving
description: Update my notification preferences in MyChart and they revert to defaults the next time I log in. Preference saving is not working.

subject: Clinical notes contain another patients info
description: Clinical notes from my last visit contain another patient name and date of birth in the header. Notes appear to be mine but header data is wrong.

subject: Intake forms do not work on tablet
description: Pre-visit intake forms in MyChart do not work on iPad. Form fields do not accept input. Have to switch to a laptop for standard intake forms.

subject: Two-factor authentication code never arrives
description: Two-factor authentication code never arrives by text. Verified phone number is correct. Locked out of MyChart completely.

subject: Nurse Garcia in oncology is exceptional
description: Nurse Maria Garcia in the oncology infusion center remembered my mother by name at every visit and made her laugh during treatment. That kindness means everything.

subject: Dr Patterson explained surgery options perfectly
description: Dr James Patterson explained my hip replacement options so clearly and patiently that I felt completely confident going into surgery.

subject: ICU night nurse deserves recognition
description: The night-shift ICU nurse who cared for my father on October 4th was extraordinary. She kept our family informed all night and treated us with great compassion.

subject: Social worker Sandra connected us with resources
description: Social worker Sandra Kim connected us with resources we did not know existed after my husbands stroke diagnosis. Her knowledge of community programs has been invaluable.

subject: Radiology tech made my MRI manageable
description: I have severe claustrophobia and was terrified of my MRI. The radiology technician talked me through the entire procedure with such calm reassurance.

subject: Dr Okafor bedside manner is exceptional
description: Dr Okafor in internal medicine takes time to explain everything in plain language and never makes me feel rushed. In 20 years of healthcare rarely felt this respected.

subject: Registration staff wonderfully patient
description: The registration desk staff helped my elderly father navigate check-in with remarkable patience. Never rushed him despite the line behind us.

subject: Pediatric nurse turned tears to smiles
description: My 4-year-old was terrified for her blood draw. The pediatric nurse brought stickers used magic numbing cream and distracted her so well she was laughing by the end.

subject: Hospital chaplain provided incredible support
description: The hospital chaplain visited my room when I was having a particularly hard night during cancer treatment. His presence and listening ear were genuinely healing.

subject: Physical therapist Rebecca is outstanding
description: PT Rebecca Nguyen has been working with me post-stroke for three months. Her creativity in adapting exercises and relentless encouragement have helped me exceed recovery goals.

subject: Emergency nurse kept me calm during crisis
description: When I arrived in the ER having what I thought was a heart attack the nurse immediately made eye contact held my hand and spoke calmly. I needed that humanity.

subject: Anesthesiologist took time to explain everything
description: Dr Washington walked me through every step of general anesthesia before my procedure. As a nervous patient her thorough explanation eliminated my fear completely.

subject: Lab tech found difficult vein on first try
description: I am a notoriously hard stick. The lab technician found my vein on the first try after several previous providers needed four or five attempts.

subject: Transport staff treated my mother with dignity
description: The patient transport staff moved my elderly mother between departments with extraordinary dignity and warmth. They spoke to her directly not through us.

subject: Wound care nurse goes the extra mile
description: Wound care nurse Denise Harper has been managing my diabetic foot ulcer for six months. Her attention to detail in dressings and patient teaching have been exceptional.

subject: Respiratory therapist responded within 2 minutes
description: During my severe asthma attack the respiratory therapist arrived within two minutes and had me stabilized within fifteen. His rapid skilled response saved my life.

subject: Dietitian Maria adapted to my culture
description: Dietitian Maria Chen created a diabetes management meal plan that worked with my cultural food preferences rather than ignoring them. First time I feel I can sustain these changes.

subject: Dr Singh advocates fiercely for patients
description: My oncologist Dr Singh called my insurance company personally to fight for a medication that was initially denied. Her advocacy got it approved. Transformative for my treatment.

subject: Night pharmacist caught dangerous interaction
description: The overnight pharmacist caught a potentially dangerous drug interaction between a new prescription and my existing medications. This could have caused a serious adverse event.

subject: Volunteer made scary diagnosis day bearable
description: The hospital volunteer who sat with me while I waited for my cancer diagnosis was a kind presence who made conversation and brought me water. On the scariest day of my life that mattered.

subject: Parking garage elevator broken for 3 weeks
description: The parking garage elevator on Level C has been out of service for three weeks with no repair timeline posted. Patients with mobility issues cannot access this level.

subject: Signage to oncology building inadequate
description: First-time visit to oncology center. Got lost for twenty-five minutes. Signage from main parking area to oncology building is completely absent.

subject: Delivery trucks block handicapped spaces
description: Delivery trucks regularly park in and block the handicapped spaces near the main entrance. This has been occurring daily with no enforcement action.

subject: No parent-with-child parking near pediatrics
description: No designated parent-with-child parking spaces near the pediatrics entrance. Parents with young children and strollers parking far away and struggling with the distance.

subject: Wayfinding app QR code goes to 404 page
description: The QR code on the lobby sign that is supposed to launch the hospital wayfinding app does not scan. It takes visitors to a 404 error page.

subject: Parking pay station on Level 2 broken
description: The parking pay station on Level 2 has been broken for two weeks. The only functional pay station is a long walk away causing people to be late for appointments.

subject: Urgent care entrance not marked from street
description: The urgent care entrance is not clearly marked from the street. I drove past the building three times before finding the correct entrance and parking area.

subject: Construction blocking accessible route
description: The current construction project has blocked the main accessible route between the parking structure and the hospital. The detour is twice as long and not fully accessible.

subject: Parking rates not clearly posted at entrance
description: Parking rate structure is not clearly posted at the entrance. Surprised by a 28-dollar charge for a two-hour visit. Rates should be displayed before entering.

subject: Night lighting inadequate in parking structure
description: The parking structure has inadequate lighting at night. As a woman leaving after an evening appointment I felt unsafe walking to my car in the dark areas of Level 4.
